impl.context: Build a Node.js todo app with a browser UI at /, a REST API under /api/todos, and SQLite storage in ./test.db. The web UI should let users add, complete, and filter todos. Prefer a simple Node.js server with HTML and vanilla client-side JavaScript. Use Node's built-in node:sqlite support for persistence when available, and avoid native SQLite addons such as better-sqlite3 or sqlite3 npm packages.
